CustomField.description: Check this if you want fields that have no value to show up. For example, if users don't have an email it will show [email]. Uncheck this if you want fields that have no value to not show up.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check this if you want fields that have no value to show up. For example, if users don't have an email it will show [email]. Uncheck this if you want fields that have no value to not show up.
CustomField.label: Show Empty Fields
